data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding optional mapping to stable system code.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Optional mapping to stable system code for deterministic workflows', but the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific mapping. The prior steps focus on bookings and member interactions, lacking any direct reference to the mapping of status vocabulary to stable system codes. This indicates a gap in the validation process for the specified requirement.
gaps: No evidence of validation for optional mapping to stable system code.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
